message.content:
@startuml
participant "Admin" as Admin
participant :DivisionPage as DivisionPage
participant :DivisionTableContainer as DivisionTableContainer
participant :DivisionTable as DivisionTable
participant :DivisionService (Frontend) as DivisionService
participant :Router as Router
participant :DivisionHTTPTransport as DivisionHTTPTransport
participant :DivisionEndpoint as DivisionEndpoint
participant :DivisionService as DivisionService
participant :DivisionCommand as DivisionCommand
participant :DivisionQuery as DivisionQuery

Actor "Admin" as AdminActor

divisionPage : DivisionPage
divisionTableContainer : DivisionTableContainer
divisionTable : DivisionTable
divisionService : DivisionService (Frontend)
router : Router
divisionHTTPTransport : DivisionHTTPTransport
divisionEndpoint : DivisionEndpoint
divisionService : DivisionService
divisionCommand : DivisionCommand
divisionQuery : DivisionQuery

AdminActor ..> divisionPage : Open "Manage Division" Page
divisionPage ..> divisionTableContainer : Render "Division Table" Container
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionTable : Render "Division Table"
divisionTable ..> divisionService : Mark "Division"
divisionService ..> divisionTableContainer : marked
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionTable : marked
divisionTable ..> divisionService : marked
divisionService ..> divisionTableContainer : marked
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionPage : marked
divisionPage ..> AdminActor : rendered
divisionPage ..> AdminActor : Mark "Division"
divisionPage ..> divisionTableContainer : Mark "Division"
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionTable : Mark "Division"
divisionTable ..> divisionService : marked
divisionService ..> divisionTableContainer : marked
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionPage : marked
divisionPage ..> AdminActor : marked
divisionPage ..> AdminActor : Click "Delete Selected" Button
divisionPage ..> divisionTableContainer : showDeleteConfirmation(item)

alt ["Cancel Delete"]
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionPage : Close Dialog
divisionPage ..> AdminActor : Close Dialog
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionTableContainer : handleDeleteConfirmation(item)
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionService : deleteDivision([payload])
divisionService ..> router : route("DELETE", "v2/divisions", formData)
router ..> divisionService : DeleteDivisions(DivisionService, [ServerOption])
divisionService ..> divisionEndpoint : DeleteMany(DivisionService)
divisionEndpoint ..> divisionService : DeleteDivisions(context, [uuid])
divisionService ..> divisionCommand : isDeleted
divisionCommand ..> divisionService : response := Response(isDeleted, nil)
divisionService ..> divisionEndpoint : response
divisionEndpoint ..> router : response
router ..> divisionHTTPTransport : response
divisionHTTPTransport ..> divisionService : response
divisionService ..> divisionTableContainer : response
divisionTableContainer ..> divisionPage : response
divisionPage ..> AdminActor : response
@enduml
